channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年06月26日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: [未译] Attack in Strait of Hormuz halts evacuation plan for stranded ships
item.description: International Maritime Organization announces pause after container ship was hit by ‘unknown projectile’

item.title: [未译] What Europe’s heat wave means for the power grid
item.description: It’s been hard to look away from headlines about the European heat wave this week. Temperatures are breaking records across the continent, and the weather is threatening lives, shutting down schools,

item.title: [未译] World Cup 'Pride Match': FIFA refuses to ban rainbow flags despite Iran, Egypt objections
item.description: FIFA has rejected calls from Iran and Egypt to ban rainbow flags at their World Cup match in Seattle on Friday, despite both countries objecting to local Pride-themed celebrations linked to the fixtur

item.title: [未译] Apple increases MacBook and iPad prices by 20%
item.description: iPhone maker loses $263bn in market capitalisation, blames costs on AI-driven memory shortage

item.title: [未译] Economic losses mount as Venezuela earthquake death toll grows
item.description: Initial forecasts suggest damage could cost as much as 7 percent of the South American nation's GDP.

item.title: [未译] Competition intensifies for Anthropic and OpenAI ahead of IPOs
item.description: Renewed challenge from open-source models raises stakes on AI labs to make their case

item.title: [未译] Supreme Court limits Roundup cancer suits against Bayer's Monsanto
item.description: Glyphosate, used in Roundup weedkiller, is the most commonly utilized herbicide in agriculture, and it has long been linked to cancer claims.

item.title: [未译] Are We GlobalShortcuts Yet?
item.description: <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/ebqmzl/are_we_globalshortcuts_yet">Comments</a></p>

item.title: [未译] EU keeps Airbus-Boeing trade truce alive
item.description: Thursday’s vote prolongs the suspension of the EU’s retaliatory tariffs; its duration is still being negotiated.

item.title: [未译] Burnham plans new ‘devolution department’ in Manchester
item.description: Likely next PM sees move as best way to grant local communities greater power over their economies, workforces and infrastructure

item.title: [未译] Head of UK’s biggest union backs Ed Miliband for chancellor
item.description: Endorsement of Unison chief opens up split with other big unions opposed to current energy secretary being appointed to Treasury

item.title: [未译] Democrats probe Trump's troubled $16 million reflecting pool renovation
item.description: President Donald Trump has attempted to spruce up Washington in advance of the country's 250th anniversary.

item.title: [未译] Repositioning retail for the AI era
item.description: Artificial intelligence is rapidly reshaping retail, but not in the ways consumers might immediately notice. The biggest transformation may not be flashy virtual try-ons or chatbot shopping assistants

item.title: [未译] Burnham needs to simplify UK taxes, says adviser Haldane
item.description: Former Bank of England chief economist says ‘thicket of regulation’ must be cut to boost growth

item.title: [未译] Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT
item.description: Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers who pay for AI have been increasingly choosing Anthropic's Claude, data shows.

item.title: [未译] SpaceX bond sale signals markets are in ‘bubble territory’, warns Allianz CIO
item.description: Debt investors will scrutinise Musk’s rocket company more closely than equity markets, says Ludovic Subran

item.title: [未译] Andy Burnham’s Ed Miliband test
item.description: The choice of chancellor will reveal the likely character of the government and the extent of any new radicalism

item.title: [未译] Notion killing Skiff-influenced email app since most users use AI agents instead
item.description: Notion is "going all in on using agents to run your inbox."

item.title: [未译] Los críticos del PSOE piden a los miembros del Comité Federal que las elecciones sean este año y que Sánchez no se presente
item.description: Alertan sobre "la crisis de credibilidad" del partido "agravada por escándalos de presunta corrupción" y "actuaciones políticas" que los alejan de sus principios y valores Leer

item.title: [未译] NATO’s Rutte gave confused account of Italy’s involvement in Iran war, Meloni says
item.description: Rutte's claim that Rome was offering "massive" support to war has created a political headache for the Italian prime minister.

item.title: [未译] Romania’s Nicușor Dan faces his biggest test as political crisis deepens
item.description: The president wants to avoid fresh elections that would likely hand power to the far right, but rival parties are struggling to agree on a new coalition.

item.title: [未译] A new paper argues Microsoft exaggerated its quantum claims a year ago
item.description:
Microsoft’s Majorana 1 processor. | Image: Microsoft
A critique published in Nature Wednesday calls the basic technology behind Microsoft's "breakthrough" quantum computin

item.title: [未译] The emergence of the web data infrastructure layer for AI
item.description: AI is booming. New use cases are emerging each day. To capitalize on the technology’s potential, enterprises require data at scale. In many cases, though, the relevant information is blocked or unstru

item.title: [未译] Hezbollah says Israeli strike killed two civilians in southern Lebanon
item.description:
Hezbollah says Israeli strike killed two civilians in southern Lebanon
Hezbollah says Israel targeted civilians on the Zouat al-Sharqiyah-M

item.title: [未译] EU targets Somalia in its anti-migration push
item.description: Countries outside the bloc "must fulfill their obligations — otherwise, there can be consequences,” said EU Migration Commissioner Magnus Brunner.

item.title: [未译] Entre Macron et Meloni, ça se réchauffe (un peu)
item.description: Présenté par Groupement Mousquetaires.

item.title: [未译] Geht Deutschland der Mittelstand verloren? Mit Gitta Connemann
item.description: Joana Lehner und Rasmus Buchsteiner analysieren die Vorschläge der Rentenkommission. Kanzler Friedrich Merz will das Paket offenbar eins zu eins umsetzen. Neben dem Aus für die Rente mit 63 steht die

item.title: [未译] Why Amazon Dropped Its OpenAI Movie, Data Center Workers Fight Back, and Meta Leaks Employee Data
item.description: Amazon-owned MGM Studios’ decision to drop the OpenAI movie is just part of AI and film industries becoming increasingly intertwined. On Uncanny Valley, we take a look at where this is all headed.

item.title: [未译] ON Semiconductor strikes $7 billion deal for Synaptics in physical AI push
item.description: ON Semiconductor said the deal bumps up its total addressable market by $30 billion, to $243 billion by 2030.

item.title: [未译] US seeks Iran deal, but 'not at any price,' Rubio says
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said on Thursday Washington would not accept any Iran deal allowing Tehran to impose fees on shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, warning it would cause "total chao
